research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.
stub_provenance_note: Stub canned hit for SCN5A. Lower logP and high TPSA reduce BBB penetration (CNS selectivity). ADMET from Chemprop v2 stub; pIC50 from Boltz-2 stub. Real values require Runpod GPU adapters.
